metadata.name: Perform Cycle Count with Mobile Scanner

description: A warehouse operator uses a handheld scanner to perform a cycle count task, guided by the system.

nodes.task_description: The operator logs into the scanner and requests a new cycle count task.

expected_outcome.value: The system assigns a location to be counted and displays it on the scanner.

nodes.task_description: The operator navigates to the location and scans the location's barcode to verify they are in the right place.

expected_outcome.value: The system confirms the location is correct.

nodes.task_description: The operator scans the item's barcode and enters the quantity they have physically counted.

expected_outcome.value: The count is entered into the system via the scanner.

nodes.task_description: The system confirms the count is complete and assigns the next location to be counted.

expected_outcome.value: The operator is seamlessly guided to their next task.
